examples: Madame Curie will always be remembered as the discoverer of the element radium.
Once a discovery claim becomes public, the discoverer receives intellectual credit.
The Athlete, the Lecturer, the Scientific Discoverer was a laughable, lovable, healthy young human thing.
The Shell fleet's 14, 000-ton drill ship in Alaska, the Discoverer, slipped anchor two weeks ago.
Loren got 50 scientists, including DNA discoverer James Watson, to petition the NIH for more SMA funding.
